journey-onboard.evidence: A clear 'Start Creating ✨' link is visible on the landing page without scrolling, linking to /onboarding.

journey-builder.evidence: Three.js Canvas renders (2352×1456) with a sidebar containing 8 object pickers (Box, Ball, Tube, Cone, Ring, Tree, House, Star) plus theme and color controls.

journey-ai.evidence: AI companion 'Spark' panel opens with input field and prompt suggestions, but submitting 'help me' returned only a fallback error ('Hmm, I got confused for a moment. Try again!'), not a meaningful AI response.

journey-save.evidence: Save button exists and profile name persists after reload ('TestKid's World'), but localStorage contains only child-profile with no world/object data, so placed objects would not survive a reload.

journey-gallery.evidence: Gallery page renders with My Worlds / Sample Worlds tabs and three sample world cards (Ocean Discovery, Space Station, Enchanted Forest) with links to explore each.
